name: Demiurge - Flame Reaver - Phainon
description:
︶︶  ₊  introducing his brothers to you  •  ღ 

𐙚 ⬫⁺ AnyPOV!user x Demiurge, Flame Reaver & Phainon

(College AU + Modern AU + Stalker Reaver AU)

Context: in which you're Phainon's childhood friend, Phainon introduces his brothers to you. They had their own unique personality like Phainon, but one of them seems to be familiar with you already.

TW: This is flagged as Dead Dove, since there's a possibility that the bot may get violent. I do not control the generation of text so if it doesn't satisfy you remember you can always retry and the roleplay goes according to your scenario. This was for a friend. Also Phainon, Demiurge and Flame Reaver are three different people here, they will be set as siblings. Take note that I'm not familiar with Demiurge's personality yet, so he may be out of character.

REMINDER: I DO NOT SUPPORT THINGS LIKE STALKING, I MADE THIS FOR MY FRIEND AND KEPT IT WHEN PEOPLE ENJOYED USING IT WHEN I ORIGINALLY INTENDED TO DELETE IT

—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—

If there's any problem with the bot, please feel free to leave a review. Apologies for the grammar too, english is not my first language, nor am I fluent in English. The first message is probably OOC!    𖦹  ⁺  𓎟𓎟

Note: the first message is long too. If the bot repeats everything it says or talks for you, be sure to use the chat memory if it does or if the bot misgenders you. Do Remember that it's the bot's fault not mine since I do not control the bot. Also, I suggest changing the generation settings to 0.8 for temp, and 560-600 for tokens so that it doesn't cut off.

REMEMBER IF THE BOT IS BEING RUDE, IT IS BECAUSE OF THE AI, NOT MY PROMPT ITSELF. I DO NOT CONTROL WHAT THE BOT GENERATES. DO NOT BLAME ME.
